title: Bunker Building Blocks
description: Introducing a variety of blast proof building blocks, perfect for decoration and securing your base against griefing without the need for claim mods or peaceful mode.
body:
# Bunker Building Blocks

Ever wanted to build a proper blast-proof bunker but hated that obsidian can't be moved with pistons? Yeah, me too.

**Obsidian Alloy** is a new building material that combines the blast resistance of obsidian with the flexibility of normal blocks. Build your secure bases, hidden vaults, and TNT-proof redstone contraptions without compromise.

---

## The Blocks

- **Obsidian Alloy Block** - Your basic building unit
- **Obsidian Alloy Bricks** - Full block, slabs, stairs, and walls
- **Obsidian Alloy Tiles** - Full block, slabs, and stairs
- **Chiseled Obsidian Alloy Brick** - For when you want to look fancy while being indestructible
- **Obsidian Alloy Pillar** - Rotatable, like quartz pillars
- **Obsidian Alloy Door & Trapdoor** - Because your bunker needs an entrance

## Why Use This?

**Blast-proof** - Same explosion resistance as obsidian (1200)

**Piston movable** - Unlike regular obsidian, you can use these in your redstone builds

**Protects adjacent blocks** - Blocks placed next to obsidian alloy won't be destroyed by explosions

**Wither & Dragon immune** - Nothing's getting through

**Balanced** - Requires a diamond pickaxe to mine

## Crafting

Combine **Copper Ingot + Obsidian** to get Obsidian Alloy Ingots. The rest follows vanilla patterns - if you know how to make stone bricks, you know how to make these.

Full **stonecutter support** included because clicking is easier than crafting.

## Compatibility

This is a simple block mod with no mixins or core mods. Should play nice with just about everything.
